title: Medical Harness Governance Policy Manifest
description: Governance is evaluated through a harness-level policy overlay, which can be INSTANTIATED from native dataset signals, converted rules, augmented resources, public standards, or synthetic policies — but is always EXECUTED uniformly as this policy manifest (emitting type=policy checkpoints, dimension=Governance). All fields here are hidden_reference (policy expected behavior is gold).

minimum_necessary_evidence.description: HIDDEN verifier requirement: evidence the agent must consult before acting

required_tool_before_action.description: HIDDEN: tools/queries required before a high-risk action (NOT exposed as must_query to the agent)

requires_escalation.description: prefer 'conditional' with escalation_triggers; do not hard-code true for every task
